name: GH_SolutionEventArgs
summary: Event arguments used for Document Solution events.

properties.name: Document
properties.summary: Gets the document that raised the event, should be the same as the "sender" parameter in the event handler.

properties.name: Duration
properties.summary: Gets the duration for this solution. The duration is a more accurate measure than EndTime-StartTime.

properties.name: EndTime
properties.summary: Gets the time when the current solution completed. If the solution hasn't completed yet this field will be DateTime.MinValue.

properties.name: StartTime
properties.summary: Gets the time when the current solution began.
